subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou be illumined by the lights of the Sun of Manifestation, which hath dawned from the horizon of the Will of God, exalted be His glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بانوار آفتاب ظهور که از افق اراده حق جل جلاله مشرقست منور باشی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @rejection, opposition and persecution
